item.title: A short story of hubris in 2020
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting

item.title: Hexia - Cosplay
item.description:
More Hexia cosplay! I can't get over how fun it was portraying the beautiful character that @miaormoa has created, and realized I still hadn't shared some of the many pics I took while cosplaying as her! Hope you all are having a lovely day!
Remember to always toss me ideas, I especially love doing any cosplays related to the imgur community, they are always so fun!
Reference image of the lovely Hexia :D
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Absolute Lunacy Thursday Memes
item.description:
Or licking my own
Faptastic!
Just from the bags of poo I collect from unflushed toilets in public restrooms
Can never go wrong with eye to pizza contact!
Phrasing gone terribly wrong
Ah yeah! Hole sale at the DG!
Not my fault didn't want to play connect four
I hope you all are having a tip top week you beautiful Imgurians!
Scent of a Woman sequel is wilding!
Or even a hello back when I say hi
Gimme a hell yeah!!!!
The Resident Evil Village fantasy come true x2
Pop! Pop! -- Magnitude
Check these acorns out!
Hope you all have a great and safe rest the week and weekend!
The ultimate power play

item.title: The haunting ruins of Khara Khoto,also known as the "Black City," lie in western Inner Mongolia, China. Founded in 1032, this city thrived as a trading hub along the Silk Road for centuries.
item.description: The haunting ruins of Khara Khoto, also known as the "Black City," lie in western Inner Mongolia, China. Founded in 1032, this city thrived as a trading hub along the Silk Road for centuries. However, by the late 14th century, it was mysteriously abandoned, possibly due to a diverted water source or warfare. Buried by sand for centuries, Khara Khoto was rediscovered in the early 20th century, revealing artifacts like religious texts, artwork, and everyday objects.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

Fun fact: Lemmings was made in Dundee, Scotland.
https://www.newsweek.com/gay-furry-hackers-hack-project-2025-1923119 I for one salute our furry hackivists in their war against fascism.
without our brain and muscle not a single wheel can turn.
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
This just keeps getting harder and harder
yes
I live in the country that invented it, fuck golf.
PISS WIZARD
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: Good boy hikes seven miles proudly with a stick he found and he receives compliments along the way!
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Weight Loss check in
item.description:
I know, I know. Selfies are frowned upon. I'm just excited to have cheekbones after losing 80 lbs. It's been almost half a year since my first weight loss post and I wanted to post an update for personal accountability.
Honestly, this may be shallow is me but I think my favorite part has been shopping at Goodwill for my new size. I feel like it's opened a whole new world of fashion! Also, I believe people can dress how they want at any size. I was just too unhappy with myself to wear anything being stretch pants and oversized shirts.
How I wanted to dress on the left (notice I didn't leave the dressing room). How I dress now that I have some confidence back. (Peep the better hair too) Starting weight: 210 lbs Current weight: hovering around 130 lbs. Give or take few. If anyone wants to know, I did use Ozempic and Mounjarno. I was extremely lucky that my insurance covered it because I was prediabetic. Literally the only thing it changed was my appetite. I went from having binge eating disorder (BED) to setting reminders on my phone to eat. The forced change in appetite gave me the space to work through my BED. I feel like it will always be lurking around but I'm ahead of it now and my entire relationship with food has changed. Tl;dr-took Ozempic, lost 80 lbs
item.dc:creator: morganblue1988
